free_text: MEASUREMENT OF THE 241-AM NEUTRON FISSION CROSS
7 SECTIONS CONSISTING OF THREE PLATES EACH.
SECTIONS CONTAINED 6 DEPOSITS OF 235-U. THE OTHER
A XENON GAS SCINTILLATOR WITH 6-LI AS A
